chosen_treatment: Option B/D Hybrid: The 'Editorial Dispatch' Parallax. The image is used as a full-width background layer, treated with a heavy translucent navy overlay and monochrome filter. This honors the user's request ('ojala traslucida, es decir de fondo') while preventing the photo's original colors from clashing with the luxury palette. An offset, solid cream 'Museum Plaque' card floats over this backdrop, creating a magazine-like layout that feels highly prestigious.

layout_blueprint.section: relative w-full py-32 md:py-48 overflow-hidden bg-[#0E2333]
layout_blueprint.container: relative z-10 max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 items-center
layout_blueprint.card_placement: md:col-start-7 md:col-span-6 lg:col-start-8 lg:col-span-5 bg-[#F5F1EA] p-10 md:p-14 shadow-2xl relative

typography_scale.surtitle: text-xs md:text-sm text-[#BFA06A] tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-sans mb-4 block
typography_scale.heading: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl text-[#0E2333] font-serif leading-none mb-6
typography_scale.body: text-base md:text-lg text-[#0E2333]/80 font-sans leading-relaxed mb-8
typography_scale.location_tag: inline-flex items-center gap-3 text-sm font-sans text-[#0E2333] uppercase tracking-widest border-t border-[#BFA06A]/30 pt-6 mt-2 w-full

layout_blueprint.corners: Zero border-radius (sharp corners, rounded-none) on all elements, specifically the cream card.
layout_blueprint.responsive_behavior: On mobile, the background image height is determined by the content padding. The card takes up full width minus standard margins. On desktop, the card is offset to the right to reveal the left side of the background photo where the group's focal point likely is.

image_treatment.css_classes: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover object-center
image_treatment.overlay: An absolute inset-0 layer over the image with bg-[#0E2333]/85 (or bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0E2333]/95 via-[#0E2333]/80 to-[#0E2333]/90) to ensure the image acts as a subtle texture rather than competing with the text.

position_in_flow: Insert as `<WDBTAConferenceSection />` immediately BEFORE the TeamSection. Flow: ... -> white -> NAVY (This Section) -> cream (Team Section).
surprise_element: A delicate, absolute-positioned gold hairline (w-[1px] bg-[#BFA06A]) that starts from the very top of the section and runs vertically down the left side (left-8 or left-16 on desktop), acting as a physical 'wire' that anchors the design. The cream card also has a subtle negative top margin or transform (-translate-y-8) to break perfect vertical symmetry.

copy.title: Capítulo de Investigación WDBTA
copy.body: La Dra. Josefina Cáceres Cortés, única representante de Chile, junto a la élite investigadora mundial en el histórico recinto modernista del Hospital de la Santa Creu i Sant Pau.

wdbta_conference_photo.description: Group photo from the WDBTA annual conference at UAB/Hospital Sant Pau. Use as the absolute background image for the new WDBTAConferenceSection.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Create a new component file for WDBTAConferenceSection. 2. Implement the layout strictly using the provided layout_blueprint and image_treatment. 3. Ensure the background image is layered beneath a heavy navy overlay so it appears translucent and moody, matching the user's request. 4. Build the solid cream 'Museum Plaque' card to overlap the background, keeping borders sharp (rounded-none). 5. Incorporate the vertical gold hairline as the 'surprise' editorial element. 6. Integrate this section into the main App flow just before the Team section. 7. Do not use any emojis. Apply data-testids to all requested elements.
